prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild infirmary; Toma Oakspire, an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket, nimbly catches glowing, mischievous potion sprites fluttering around a wooden supply shelf, guiding them with quick, precise hand movements toward a containment jar held by Toma Starling, a masculine healer in cream and mint robes. Soft, warm lamplight, cinematic camera, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild infirmary shot; Toma Starling gently caps the containment jar as the last sprite is secured, then both Toma Oakspire and Toma Starling work in synchronized motion to organize scattered herb bundles and glass vials back onto the shelf, their expressions focused and collaborative. Consistent lighting and character appearance, no text, no watermark.
